title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a roundup of recent AI releases including Happy Horse (humanoid robot), SenseNova U1 (multimodal model), Talkie (LM), Vista 4D (3D generation), Grok 4.3, Mistral 3.5, and others. The video covers tools for motion capture, video editing, 3D reconstruction, and agentic systems.
